examples: From waste and death comes such incredible pulchritude.
Only by owning loneliness, pulchritude and solitude, can we have our flowers fostered many years.
Her youngster and pulchritude could expose her to danger.
With perfectly trimmed pompoms and fluffed out fur, she's the very essence of poodle pulchritude.
But with perfectly trimmed pompoms and fluffed out fur, she was the very essence of poodle pulchritude.
